status.config_invalid_time_window: Invalid time_window configuration. Check anchor, duration, step, and count in YAML.
status.config_too_many_windows: Too many time windows (maximum {{max}}). Reduce count in time_window.
status.config_invalid_x_axis_format: Invalid x_axis_format. Use a supported Luxon format string (see documentation).
status.config_invalid_tooltip_format: Invalid tooltip_format. Use a supported Luxon format string (see documentation).
status.point_cap_exceeded: Too many timeline slots for this chart (maximum {{max}}). Use a coarser aggregation or a shorter window.
status.error_api: Failed to fetch long-term statistics data.
status.error_generic: An error occurred while loading data.
status.no_data: There is no data to display for the selected period.
summary.incomplete_reference: Reference data for this period is incomplete…
text_summary.no_reference: There are not enough reference data points yet to compare your consumption.
text_summary.neutral_band: Within a small margin ({{deltaPercent}}), your energy use is about the same as in the same period last year ({{deltaUnit}}).
text_summary.neutral_band_mom: Within a small margin ({{deltaPercent}}), your energy use is about the same as in the previous month ({{deltaUnit}}).
text_summary.insufficient_comparison: Not enough data to compare this period to the reference.
text_summary.production.higher: Your energy production is {{deltaUnit}} ({{deltaPercent}}) higher than in the same period last year.
text_summary.production.lower: Your energy production is {{deltaUnit}} ({{deltaPercent}}) lower than in the same period last year.
text_summary.production.higher_mom: Your energy production is {{deltaUnit}} ({{deltaPercent}}) higher than in the previous month.
text_summary.production.lower_mom: Your energy production is {{deltaUnit}} ({{deltaPercent}}) lower than in the previous month.
text_summary.similar: Your energy consumption is at a similar level to the same period last year.
text_summary.higher: Your energy consumption is {{deltaUnit}} ({{deltaPercent}}) higher than in the same period last year.
text_summary.lower: Your energy consumption is {{deltaUnit}} ({{deltaPercent}}) lower than in the same period last year.
text_summary.similar_mom: Your energy consumption is at a similar level to the previous month.
text_summary.higher_mom: Your energy consumption is {{deltaUnit}} ({{deltaPercent}}) higher than in the previous month.
text_summary.lower_mom: Your energy consumption is {{deltaUnit}} ({{deltaPercent}}) lower than in the previous month.
